Video.summary: We're counting down the 100 funniest videos of all time. Hope you're ready, because each one is EPIC!
Video.title: Episode 16

Video.summary: Pranks, a 'resurrected' body, a garbage man’s surprise, wild hose mishaps & a boy with mascara.
Video.title: Episode 1611

Video.summary: Smiling dogs, a squirrel loose in a house, and babies reacting to their first bites.
Video.title: Episode 1612

Video.summary: A parasail fail that's a drag; canines and kittens; awful wedding vows; Granny's cake has too many candles.
Video.title: Episode 114

Video.summary: Finalist videos include Sports, Kids, - Animals and "Oh, What a Day;" as well as the best - wedding clips.
Video.title: Episode 115

Video.summary: Babies reacting to foods, producer’s favorite clips, and the $100,000 grand prize winner.
Video.title: Episode 116

Video.summary: A cat coming out of nowhere after an - unsuspecting Hummingbird; and a girl gets stuck - climbing in a window.
Video.title: Episode 201

Video.summary: Highlights include a dad rolling downhill into a - stream; and a couple in a canoe get stuck in rapids.
